name: Basic Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450°F.
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda.
3. Cut in the vegetable shortening until the mixture resembles bread crumbs.
4. Stir in the buttermilk with a wooden spoon until just blended.
5. Turn the mixture out onto a floured surface and knead 10 times.
6. Pat the dough into a rectangle about 1/2-inch thick.
7. Cut biscuits using a 3-inch cutter, and place them close together on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake in the center of the oven for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown. Serve immediately. Makes about 20 biscuits. Biscuits can be made up to one day in advance and stored tightly covered in aluminum foil. Reheat in a 300°F oven for 10 minutes.
